name: Dawar Ali
bio: DevOps engineer focused on CI/CD, Kubernetes, and AWS. I design resilient platforms, automate delivery, and improve developer velocity.
about: I specialize in building scalable infrastructure and reliable delivery pipelines. I enjoy solving reliability challenges, reducing toil, and enabling teams with strong platform engineering practices.

highlights: Built GitHub Actions pipelines reducing deploy time by 60%
Provisioned AWS infrastructure with Terraform across multiple environments
Implemented cluster observability with Prometheus and Grafana
Migrated workloads to Kubernetes with zero-downtime rollouts
Introduced IaC best practices and modules for reuse
Improved incident response with dashboards and alerts

projects.name: Kubernetes GitOps Platform
projects.description: Multi-tenant GitOps platform with Argo CD, app-of-apps pattern, and automated environment promotion.

projects.name: Serverless CI/CD on AWS
projects.description: Event-driven CI/CD pipeline with CodeBuild and GitHub webhooks deploying to Lambda and API Gateway.
